info_types.name: MessageCount VIN
info_types.description: Number of messages to report Vehicle Identification Number (VIN). For ISO 15765-4 (CAN), support for this parameter is not recommended/required.
info_types.description_zh: 报告车辆识别号码(VIN)所需消息数。对于ISO 15765-4(CAN)，不建议/不要求支持此参数。

info_types.name: Vehicle Identification Number
info_types.description: 17-character VIN. For CAN, single response message with all VIN characters without fill bytes. Default $3F [?] if not programmed or unavailable.
info_types.description_zh: 17字符VIN。CAN协议为单条响应消息包含所有VIN字符无填充字节。未编程或不可用时默认$3F [?]。

info_types.name: MessageCount CALID
info_types.description: Number of messages to report calibration identifications. Message count is always a multiple of 4.
info_types.description_zh: 报告标定标识所需消息数。消息计数始终为4的倍数。

info_types.name: Calibration Identifications
info_types.description: 16 ASCII characters per CALID. Multiple CALIDs possible. Printable ASCII $20-$7E. Unused bytes $00 at end. Default $3F [?] if unavailable.
info_types.description_zh: 每个CALID 16个ASCII字符。可能有多个CALID。可打印ASCII $20-$7E。未使用字节末尾填充$00。不可用时默认$3F [?]。

info_types.name: MessageCount CVN
info_types.description: Number of messages to report Calibration Verification Numbers.
info_types.description_zh: 报告标定验证号所需消息数。

info_types.name: Calibration Verification Numbers
info_types.description: 4-byte hex CVN per calibration. Verifies software integrity. Method 1: computed once per trip, stored in NVM. Method 2: computed on demand. Default $00 if unavailable.
info_types.description_zh: 每个标定对应4字节十六进制CVN。验证软件完整性。方法1：每次行程计算一次存于NVM。方法2：按需计算。不可用时默认$00。

info_types.name: MessageCount IPT
info_types.description: Number of messages to report In-use Performance Tracking. InfoType $08 for SI, $0B for CI.
info_types.description_zh: 报告在用性能跟踪所需消息数。InfoType $08用于SI，$0B用于CI。

info_types.name: In-use Performance Tracking (SI)
info_types.description: IPT for spark ignition engines. 32/40/56 data bytes. All 2-byte unsigned counters reported in order.
info_types.description_zh: 点火式发动机在用性能跟踪。32/40/56数据字节。所有2字节无符号计数器按顺序报告。

info_types.name: MessageCount ECUNAME
info_types.description: Number of messages to report ECU acronym and text name. Always 5 for non-CAN.
info_types.description_zh: 报告ECU缩写和文本名称所需消息数。非CAN协议始终为5。

info_types.name: ECUNAME
info_types.description: 20 ASCII characters: 4-char acronym + '-' delimiter + 15-char text name. Unused bytes $00.
info_types.description_zh: 20个ASCII字符：4字符缩写 + '-'分隔符 + 15字符文本名称。未使用字节$00。

info_types.name: In-use Performance Tracking (CI)
info_types.description: IPT for compression ignition engines (2010 MY+). 32 or 36 data bytes. All 2-byte unsigned counters.
info_types.description_zh: 压燃式发动机在用性能跟踪（2010年及以后车型）。32或36数据字节。所有2字节无符号计数器。
